steps.title: Find Andrew's mean
steps.content:
Andrew's six masses have total $16.8$ kilograms, so Andrew's mean is
$$
\frac{16.8}{6}=2.8
$$

steps.title: Find Maria's required total
steps.content:
Maria's mean is $0.1$ kilogram greater, so her mean must be $2.9$ kilograms. Since Maria has $6$ rocks, her required total is
$$
6(2.9)=17.4
$$

steps.title: Subtract the known masses
steps.content: Maria's five known masses total $14.8$ kilograms. Subtract this from her required total: $$ 17.4-14.8 $$ The answer is 2.6.
